description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Rewards Rate for Spark Savings USDT on Ethereum will be maintained to be equal to
Aave Ethereum Core USDT supply rate plus
The Spark Savings USDT Spread will be defined as part of the ALM Planner configuration process, and will be set within a range of -0.5% to 2%.
description: This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance update certain Target Liquidity and Rewards Rate parameters.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
